title: Snowiest Snow
description: Show snow overlay on all blocks. No mods needed!
body:
# Snowiest-Snow
Minecraft resource pack that shows snow overlay on all blocks. No mods needed!

![Comparison Image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/57331134/142962646-c57c780c-a2c9-43a7-8940-f1c0902e5afc.gif)

The entire resource pack is just models for the snow layers and snow held item, there are no textures. Thank you!
